requirement_topic.en: Local Importer / Authorised Agent (Tanzanian Company Required)
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口商／授权代理（须为坦桑尼亚注册公司）
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口商／授權代理（須為坦桑尼亞註冊公司）

summary.en: A locally registered Tanzanian company acting as importer or authorised agent is required for TCRA type approval registration and market entry. The Tanzanian importer or agent must be registered with the Tanzania Business Registrations and Licensing Agency (BRELA) and, for telecommunications equipment, registered or recognised by TCRA. The importer is responsible for ensuring that imported wireless and telecommunications equipment carries a valid TCRA type approval certificate and that all TBS/TZS compliance documentation is in order. Swahili product documentation alongside English is increasingly expected by Tanzanian authorities.
summary.zh: TCRA型式批准注册及市场准入须委任在坦桑尼亚本地注册的公司担任进口商或授权代理。坦桑尼亚进口商或代理须在坦桑尼亚企业注册及许可机构（BRELA）注册，对于电信设备，还须在TCRA注册或获得其认可。进口商须确保进口的无线及电信设备持有有效的TCRA型式批准证书，且所有TBS/TZS合规文件完备。坦桑尼亚当局越来越要求产品文件同时提供斯瓦希里语和英语版本。
summary.zht: TCRA型式批准註冊及市場准入須委任在坦桑尼亞本地註冊的公司擔任進口商或授權代理。坦桑尼亞進口商或代理須在坦桑尼亞企業註冊及許可機構（BRELA）註冊，對於電信設備，還須在TCRA註冊或獲得其認可。進口商須確保進口的無線及電信設備持有有效的TCRA型式批准證書，且所有TBS/TZS合規文件完備。坦桑尼亞當局越來越要求產品文件同時提供斯瓦希里語和英語版本。

standards_or_laws: Electronic and Postal Communications Act (EPOCA) 2010 (Tanzania) — importer and dealer registration
Tanzania Business Registrations and Licensing Agency (BRELA) Act
TCRA Type Approval Guidelines — authorised importer/agent requirements

summary.en: China has no domestic equivalent to the Tanzania local importer or authorised agent requirement for market entry of wireless devices. For China-domestic sales, the manufacturer or a domestic distributor handles SRRC/NAL/CCC registration without a requirement for a locally incorporated Tanzanian entity. Chinese exporters must identify and appoint a Tanzanian-registered company to act as importer or authorised agent before applying for TCRA type approval.
summary.zh: 中国国内没有与坦桑尼亚本地进口商或授权代理要求等同的制度用于无线设备市场准入。对于国内销售，制造商或国内经销商办理SRRC/NAL/CCC注册，无需委任坦桑尼亚本地注册实体。中国出口商须在申请TCRA型式批准前确定并委任坦桑尼亚注册公司担任进口商或授权代理。
summary.zht: 中國國內沒有與坦桑尼亞本地進口商或授權代理要求等同的制度用於無線設備市場准入。對於國內銷售，製造商或國內經銷商辦理SRRC/NAL/CCC註冊，無需委任坦桑尼亞本地註冊實體。中國出口商須在申請TCRA型式批准前確定並委任坦桑尼亞註冊公司擔任進口商或授權代理。

standards_or_laws: No China-domestic equivalent; SRRC/NAL/CCC registration (China) covers domestic market entry only

gap.en: No China-domestic process maps to the Tanzania local importer or authorised agent requirement. A Tanzanian-registered company must be appointed as importer or authorised agent and recognised by TCRA before TCRA type approval registration can proceed. This entity is also responsible for ongoing compliance with TCRA, TBS/TZS, and TRA obligations in Tanzania.
gap.zh: 中国国内流程不涵盖坦桑尼亚本地进口商或授权代理要求。须在TCRA型式批准注册程序启动前委任坦桑尼亚注册公司担任进口商或授权代理，并获TCRA认可。该实体还须持续履行在坦桑尼亚的TCRA、TBS/TZS及TRA合规义务。
gap.zht: 中國國內流程不涵蓋坦桑尼亞本地進口商或授權代理要求。須在TCRA型式批准註冊程序啟動前委任坦桑尼亞註冊公司擔任進口商或授權代理，並獲TCRA認可。該實體還須持續履行在坦桑尼亞的TCRA、TBS/TZS及TRA合規義務。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally registered Tanzanian company acting as importer or authorised agent is mandatory for TCRA type approval registration and market entry of wireless and telecommunications devices in Tanzania. There is no China-domestic equivalent. The appointed agent must be recognised by TCRA and is responsible for maintaining ongoing regulatory compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 坦桑尼亚本地注册公司担任进口商或授权代理，是TCRA型式批准注册及无线和电信设备进入坦桑尼亚市场的强制要求。中国国内无等同制度。所委任的代理须获TCRA认可，并负责持续维护监管合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 坦桑尼亞本地註冊公司擔任進口商或授權代理，是TCRA型式批准註冊及無線和電信設備進入坦桑尼亞市場的強制要求。中國國內無等同制度。所委任的代理須獲TCRA認可，並負責持續維護監管合規。
